name: first-run-red-team
description: Red-team a product's onboarding, permissions, activation, and first-success experience to find where new users get confused, think the app is broken, or abandon setup.

interface.shortDescription: Red-team a product's onboarding, permissions, activation, and first-success experience to find where new users get confused, think the app is broken, or abandon setup.
interface.longDescription: Red-team a product's onboarding, permissions, activation, and first-success experience to find where new users get confused, think the app is broken, or abandon setup. Works well in repo-local and Codex cloud workflows that operate on a checked-out repository.
defaultPrompt: Red-team the first-run experience for this product. Find where a new user gets confused, abandons setup, or thinks the app is broken.
